ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflows" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow */,
  "workflow_name" TEXT /* Name of the workflow */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workflow */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the workflow belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the workflow */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the workflow */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the workflow is active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflows_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflows_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflows_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the state belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the state */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the state is active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stories" (
  "user_story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user story */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the user story */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user story */,
  "acceptance_criteria" TEXT /* Acceptance criteria for the user story */,
  "conversation_notes" TEXT /* Conversation notes for the user story */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user story belongs to */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the user story belongs to */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the user story is in */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user story */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user story */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the user story */,
  "estimated_hours" REAL /* Estimated time to complete the user story */,
  "actual_hours" REAL /* Actual time taken to complete the user story */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user story has been deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Assigned to (username) */,
  "user_story_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user story the task belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task */,
  "estimated_hours" REAL /* Estimated time to complete the task */,
  "actual_hours" REAL /* Actual time taken to complete the task */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the task has been deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("user_story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product owner, developer, UX specialist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active or deactivated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition */,
  "from_state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the from state */,
  "to_state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the to state */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the transition belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transition */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transition is active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transitions_to_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transitions_from_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transitions_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_story_transitions" (
  "user_story_transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user story transition */,
  "user_story_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user story */,
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transition */,
  "transition_date" TEXT /* Date of the transition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transition */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transition has been deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_story_transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_story_transitions_transition_id FOREIGN KEY ("transition_id") REFERENCES transitions ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_story_transitions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_story_transitions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_story_transitions_user_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("user_story_id")
)
